title: Duotone Image Hero
description: Create a hero section with a duotone effect using background-blend-mode with a gradient overlay on an image.
hint: Use background with an image URL and a linear-gradient, then apply background-blend-mode: multiply.

title: Text Reveal with Difference
description: Create a heading that reveals a background image through its text using mix-blend-mode: difference on a dark background.
hint: Set the heading text color to white on a dark background and apply mix-blend-mode: difference.

title: Hover-Reveal Image Gallery
description: Build an image gallery where each card has a colored overlay using mix-blend-mode that desaturates or reveals on hover.
hint: Use position: absolute overlay with a gradient and mix-blend-mode: multiply, then change opacity on hover.
criteria: Hover changes overlay opacity or blend mode

title: Video Color Overlay
description: Create a video background with a colored overlay using mix-blend-mode that changes color over time with CSS animation.
hint: Overlay a div with a gradient on top of a video element and animate the background-position or colors.
